2604.27962.title: Language Models Refine Mechanical Linkage Designs Through Symbolic Reflection and Modular Optimisation
2604.27962.paper_summary: Designing mechanical linkages involves combinatorial topology selection and continuous parameter fitting. We show that language models can systematically improve linkage designs through symbolic representations. Language model agents explore discrete topologies while numerical optimisers fit continuous parameters. A symbolic lifting operator translates simulator trajectories into qualitative descriptors, motion labels, temporal predicates, and structural diagnostics that models interpret across iterative design cycles. Across six engineering-relevant motion targets and three open-source models (Llama 3.3 70B, Qwen3 4B, Qwen3 MoE 30B-A3B), the modular architecture reduces geometric error by up to 68% and improves structural validity by up to 134% over monolithic baselines. Critically, 78.6% of iterative refinement trajectories show measurable improvement, with the system correctly diagnosing overconstraint (56.3%) and underconstraint (35.6%) failure modes and proposing grounded corrections. Models across all three families acquire interpretable mechanical reasoning strategies without fine-tuning, demonstrating that principled symbolic abstraction bridges generative AI and the numerical precision required for engineering design.
2604.27962.paper_summary_zh: 設計機械連桿涉及組合拓撲選擇和連續參數擬合。<lb/>我們展示了語言模型如何通過符號表示系統性地改善連桿設計。<lb/>語言模型代理探索離散拓撲，而數值優化器則擬合連續參數。<lb/>一個符號提升運算子將模擬器軌跡轉換為定性描述符、運動標籤、時間謂詞和結構診斷，這些模型在迭代設計周期中進行解釋。<lb/>在六個與工程相關的運動目標和三個開源模型（Llama 3.3 70B、Qwen3 4B、Qwen3 MoE 30B-A3B）中，模塊化架構將幾何誤差降低了最多68%，並在單體基準上提高了結構有效性達到134%。<lb/>關鍵是，78.6%的迭代精煉軌跡顯示出可測量的改善，系統正確診斷了過約束（56.3%）和欠約束（35.6%）失效模式，並提出了基於實證的修正。<lb/>所有三個系列的模型在未經微調的情況下獲得了可解釋的機械推理策略，顯示出原則性的符號抽象橋接了生成性AI和工程設計所需的數值精確性。
2604.27962.author: João Pedro Gandarela et.al.
2604.27962.authors: João Pedro Gandarela, Thiago Rios, Stefan Menzel, André Freitas
